content.body:
Hi folks 👋
I'm adding a validator for the source maps generated by the Kotlin/JS compiler (just following the spec while implementing it) and found a small thing in [Section 9.1.2.4: GetOptionalListOfArrayIndexes](https://tc39.es/ecma426/#sec-GetOptionalListOfArrayIndexes).
On operation 5.a `item ≠ +0𝔽, and item ≥ +0𝔽, then` we check both that item is not +0 and >= +0, so my questions are:
- Is it correct? I mean, the subroutine is used for parsing `ignoreList`, and the field could contain `0` (we even have it as an example at the beginning of the[ section 9](https://tc39.es/ecma426/#sec-source-map-format))
- If it's correct, could it be simplified to just `> +0𝔽`
- If it's correct, in the header to the section, it's declared `returns a List of non-negative integers`, should it be in this case `returns a List of positive integers`
content.formatted_body:
Hi folks 👋
I'm adding a validator for the source maps generated by the Kotlin/JS compiler (just following the spec while implementing it) and found a small thing in Section 9.1.2.4: GetOptionalListOfArrayIndexes.
On operation 5.a item ≠ +0𝔽, and item ≥ +0𝔽, then we check both that item is not +0 and >= +0, so my questions are:

  • Is it correct? I mean, the subroutine is used for parsing ignoreList, and the field could contain 0 (we even have it as an example at the beginning of the section 9)
  • If it's correct, could it be simplified to just > +0𝔽
  • If it's correct, in the header to the section, it's declared returns a List of non-negative integers, should it be in this case returns a List of positive integers

content.body:
And follow-up question regarding the same subroutine (in the scope of the `ignoreList`). 
- Is it true that `ignoreList` could contain `null` as a value inside the array? On operation 5.b.ii, we accept `null` as a valid value of the array
- If it's correct, what do you think about re-naming the sub-routine in the same way as [GetOptionalListOfOptionalStrings](https://tc39.es/ecma426/#sec-GetOptionalListOfOptionalStrings) (like `GetOptionalListOfOptionalArrayIndexes`)?
content.formatted_body:
And follow-up question regarding the same subroutine (in the scope of the ignoreList).

  • Is it true that ignoreList could contain null as a value inside the array? On operation 5.b.ii, we accept null as a valid value of the array
  • If it's correct, what do you think about re-naming the sub-routine in the same way as GetOptionalListOfOptionalStrings (like GetOptionalListOfOptionalArrayIndexes)?

content.body: The PR with the changes: https://github.com/tc39/ecma426/pull/250
